type.description:
buildpack generates a container image using Cloud Native Buildpacks and
publishes it to the Halfpipe registry. The task uses [Paketo Buildpacks]
which is an implementation of the Cloud Native Buildpacks specification.

[Paketo Buildpacks]: https://paketo.io

image.description: Docker image name to build and push. Format: eu.gcr.io/halfpipe-io/<team>/<image-name>.

buildpacks.description: Buildpack identifiers to use for building the image e.g. paketo-buildpacks/java.

builder.description: Paketo builder to use. Defaults to paketobuildpacks/builder-jammy-buildpackless-base.

path.description: Path to the application source code to build. Defaults to current directory.

restore_artifacts.description: Restore artifacts saved by previous tasks.

vars.description: Environment variables passed to the pack build command.

manual_trigger.description: Task must be triggered manually (Concourse only).

retries.description: Number of times to retry the task if it fails.

timeout.description: Timeout duration for the task. If exceeded the task fails. Defaults to 1h.

build_history.description: Number of build logs to retain. Defaults to 20 (Concourse only).

Buildpack.description:
buildpack generates a container image using Cloud Native Buildpacks and
publishes it to the Halfpipe registry. The task uses [Paketo Buildpacks]
which is an implementation of the Cloud Native Buildpacks specification.

[Paketo Buildpacks]: https://paketo.io

type.description:
consumer-integration-test is designed to run in a provider's pipeline. The
task allows for a test script to be run. The script is passed two environment
variables automatically: DEPENDENCY_NAME (set by provider_name) and
<DEPENDENCY_NAME>_DEPLOYED_HOST (set by provider_host).

consumer.description: GitHub repository name of the consumer, with optional sub-directory for monorepos e.g. repo-name or monorepo/dir.

consumer_host.description: Address of the consumer application in the same environment as the provider.

git_clone_options.description: Custom options for git clone of the consumer repository e.g. --depth 100.

provider_host.description: Address of the provider application to test. Defaults to the candidate route in pre_promote.

provider_name.description: Name of the provider app, exposed as DEPENDENCY_NAME. Defaults to the pipeline name.

docker_compose_file.description: Path to the consumer docker-compose file. Defaults to docker-compose.yml.

docker_compose_service.description: Service name in the consumer docker-compose. Defaults to code.

vars.description: Environment variables available to the docker-compose service.

save_artifacts.description: Paths to files or directories to save for use in subsequent tasks.

save_artifacts_on_failure.description: Paths to save when the task fails, useful for test reports.

manual_trigger.description: Task must be triggered manually (Concourse only).

retries.description: Number of times to retry the task if it fails.

timeout.description: Timeout duration for the task. If exceeded the task fails. Defaults to 1h.

build_history.description: Number of build logs to retain. Defaults to 20 (Concourse only).

ConsumerIntegrationTest.description:
consumer-integration-test is designed to run in a provider's pipeline. The
task allows for a test script to be run. The script is passed two environment
variables automatically: DEPENDENCY_NAME (set by provider_name) and
<DEPENDENCY_NAME>_DEPLOYED_HOST (set by provider_host).

type.description:
copy-container-image copies an image from the halfpipe registry
(eu.gcr.io/halfpipe-io/) to another registry. Currently only AWS ECR is
supported as the target. Normally this would be used after a docker-push
or buildpack task.

source.description: Full source image URL in the halfpipe registry, with or without tag.

target.description: Target ECR image URL or bare ECR registry URL.

aws_access_key_id.description: AWS access key ID for the target ECR registry. Defaults to shared credentials from Vault.

aws_secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key for the target ECR registry. Defaults to shared credentials from Vault.

manual_trigger.description: Task must be triggered manually (Concourse only).

retries.description: Number of times to retry the task if it fails.

timeout.description: Timeout duration for the task. If exceeded the task fails. Defaults to 1h.

build_history.description: Number of build logs to retain. Defaults to 20 (Concourse only).

CopyContainerImage.description:
copy-container-image copies an image from the halfpipe registry
(eu.gcr.io/halfpipe-io/) to another registry. Currently only AWS ECR is
supported as the target. Normally this would be used after a docker-push
or buildpack task.

type.description: deploy-cf deploys an app to Cloud Foundry.

space.description: Cloud Foundry space to deploy to.

api.description: Cloud Foundry API endpoint. Defaults to ((cloudfoundry.api-snpaas)).

org.description: Cloud Foundry organisation. Defaults to the value of team.

manifest.description: Path to the Cloud Foundry app manifest, relative to the halfpipe manifest. Defaults to manifest.yml.

test_domain.description: Domain used when pushing the app as a candidate. Derived from the API by default.

vars.description: Environment variables injected into the CF app environment.

deploy_artifact.description: Path to a file or directory saved by a previous task to deploy to CF.

pre_promote.description: Tasks to run after the candidate is deployed but before it is promoted to live. TEST_ROUTE is injected.

pre_start.description: CF CLI commands to run immediately before the candidate app is started.

rolling.description: Use rolling deployment instead of blue-green.

stop_candidate_on_failure.description: Stop the candidate app if deployment fails.

cli_version.description: CF CLI version to use. Allowed values: cf7, cf8. Defaults to cf7.

docker_tag.description: Docker image tag to deploy. Required when deploying a Docker image: version or gitref.

github_environment.description: GitHub environment to associate with this deployment.

manual_trigger.description: Task must be triggered manually (Concourse only).

retries.description: Number of times to retry the task if it fails.

timeout.description: Timeout duration for the task. If exceeded the task fails. Defaults to 1h.

build_history.description: Number of build logs to retain. Defaults to 20 (Concourse only).

DeployCF.description: deploy-cf deploys an app to Cloud Foundry.

type.description: deploy-katee deploys an application to Katee.

vars.description: Environment variables available to the vela manifest.

vela_manifest.description: Path to the vela manifest. Defaults to vela.yaml.

tag.description: Deprecated: no longer used - safe to delete.
tag.deprecationMessage: no longer used - safe to delete

environment.description: Deprecated: no longer used - safe to delete.
environment.deprecationMessage: no longer used - safe to delete

namespace.description: Vela namespace to deploy to. Defaults to katee-<team>.

deployment_check_timeout.description: Deprecated: use max_checks and check_interval instead.

check_interval.description: Seconds between each deployment status check. Defaults to 2.

max_checks.description: Maximum number of status checks before the deployment is considered failed. Defaults to 60.

github_environment.description: GitHub environment to associate with this deployment.

manual_trigger.description: Task must be triggered manually (Concourse only).

retries.description: Number of times to retry the task if it fails.

timeout.description: Timeout duration for the task. If exceeded the task fails. Defaults to 1h.

build_history.description: Number of build logs to retain. Defaults to 20 (Concourse only).

DeployKatee.description: deploy-katee deploys an application to Katee.

type.description:
deploy-ml-modules deploys a version of the shared ml modules library from
artifactory.

ml_modules_version.description: Version of the ml-modules artifact in Artifactory.

app_name.description: App name in MarkLogic. Defaults to the pipeline name.

app_version.description: App version in MarkLogic. Defaults to the git revision. Cannot be set with use_build_version.

use_build_version.description: Use $BUILD_VERSION instead of $GIT_REVISION for the app version. Cannot be set with app_version.

username.description: Username to connect to MarkLogic. Defaults to the shared vault secret.

password.description: Password to connect to MarkLogic. Defaults to the shared vault secret.

manual_trigger.description: Task must be triggered manually (Concourse only).

retries.description: Number of times to retry the task if it fails.

timeout.description: Timeout duration for the task. If exceeded the task fails. Defaults to 1h.

build_history.description: Number of build logs to retain. Defaults to 20 (Concourse only).

DeployMLModules.description:
deploy-ml-modules deploys a version of the shared ml modules library from
artifactory.

type.description: deploy-ml-zip deploys local XQuery files to MarkLogic using ml-deploy.

deploy_zip.description: Path to the zip file containing XQuery source files, relative to the manifest.

app_name.description: App name in MarkLogic. Defaults to the pipeline name.

app_version.description: App version in MarkLogic. Defaults to the git revision. Cannot be set with use_build_version.

use_build_version.description: Use $BUILD_VERSION instead of $GIT_REVISION for the app version. Cannot be set with app_version.

username.description: Username to connect to MarkLogic. Defaults to the shared vault secret.

password.description: Password to connect to MarkLogic. Defaults to the shared vault secret.

manual_trigger.description: Task must be triggered manually (Concourse only).

retries.description: Number of times to retry the task if it fails.

timeout.description: Timeout duration for the task. If exceeded the task fails. Defaults to 1h.

build_history.description: Number of build logs to retain. Defaults to 20 (Concourse only).

DeployMLZip.description: deploy-ml-zip deploys local XQuery files to MarkLogic using ml-deploy.

image.description: Path of docker image in registry including tag.

type.description:
docker-compose executes docker-compose based on a docker-compose.yml file.
This file must be present in the same directory as the halfpipe manifest.

command.description: Command to run against the service. If omitted the default service command is used.

service.description: Name of the docker-compose service to run. Defaults to app.

save_artifacts.description: Paths to files or directories to save for use in subsequent tasks.

restore_artifacts.description: Restore artifacts saved by previous tasks.

save_artifacts_on_failure.description: Paths to save when the task fails, useful for test reports.

manual_trigger.description: Task must be triggered manually (Concourse only).

retries.description: Number of times to retry the task if it fails.

timeout.description: Timeout duration for the task. If exceeded the task fails. Defaults to 1h.

build_history.description: Number of build logs to retain. Defaults to 20 (Concourse only).

DockerCompose.description:
docker-compose executes docker-compose based on a docker-compose.yml file.
This file must be present in the same directory as the halfpipe manifest.

type.description:
docker-push builds a Docker image and pushes it to a docker registry. The
image will be tagged with the latest tag, the gitref and pipeline version
by default.

image.description: Docker image to build and push. Recommended format: eu.gcr.io/halfpipe-io/<team>/<image-name>.

username.description: Username for the target Docker registry.

password.description: Password for the target Docker registry.

ignore_vulnerabilities.description: Do not fail the build if critical vulnerabilities are found during image scanning.

scan_timeout.description: Number of minutes a Trivy vulnerability scan is allowed to run before timing out.

vars.description: Docker build-time variables (ARGs). Do not use for secrets - values are visible in docker history.

secrets.description: Docker build-time secrets, mounted securely during build.

restore_artifacts.description: Restore artifacts saved by previous tasks.

dockerfile_path.description: Path to the Dockerfile, relative to the manifest. Defaults to Dockerfile.

build_path.description: Path to the folder to use as the Docker build context, relative to the manifest.

tag.description: Deprecated: no longer used - safe to delete.
tag.deprecationMessage: no longer used - safe to delete

platforms.description: Target platforms to build for, e.g. linux/amd64, linux/arm64. Defaults to linux/amd64.

use_cache.description: Enable layer caching to speed up builds by reusing layers from previous builds.

manual_trigger.description: Task must be triggered manually (Concourse only).

retries.description: Number of times to retry the task if it fails.

timeout.description: Timeout duration for the task. If exceeded the task fails. Defaults to 1h.

build_history.description: Number of build logs to retain. Defaults to 20 (Concourse only).

DockerPush.description:
docker-push builds a Docker image and pushes it to a docker registry. The
image will be tagged with the latest tag, the gitref and pipeline version
by default.

type.description: docker trigger runs the pipeline when a docker image has been updated.

image.description: Docker image to watch for updates.

DockerTrigger.description: docker trigger runs the pipeline when a docker image has been updated.

FeatureToggles.description:
FeatureToggles enable optional pipeline behaviours.

| Toggle | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `update-pipeline` | Inserts a job that keeps the pipeline/workflow in sync with the halfpipe manifest. Sets BUILD_VERSION. |
| `update-pipeline-and-tag` | Like update-pipeline, but also tags the git repo with `<PIPELINE_NAME>/v<BUILD_VERSION>`. |
| `github-statuses` | Updates GitHub commit statuses from Concourse job results (Actions does this by default). |
| `ghas` | Enables GitHub Advanced Security scanning on docker-push tasks. |

url.description: URL associated with the GitHub environment.

GitHubEnvironment.description: GitHub environment to associate with this deployment.

type.description:
git trigger defines which git repo halfpipe will operate on. By convention
there is always a git trigger as default. To disable it, set manual_trigger
to true.

uri.description: Git repository URI. Defaults to the URI resolved from .git/config.

private_key.description: SSH private key for cloning the repository. Defaults to ((github.private_key)).

watched_paths.description: Only trigger when changes occur in these paths (globs supported).

ignored_paths.description: Do not trigger when changes occur only in these paths (globs supported).

git_crypt_key.description: Base64-encoded git-crypt key to unlock an encrypted repository.

branch.description: Branch to track. Required when running halfpipe on a non-default branch.

shallow.description: Shallow clone the repository (--depth 1). Defaults to false in Concourse and true in GitHub Actions.

GitTrigger.description:
git trigger defines which git repo halfpipe will operate on. By convention
there is always a git trigger as default. To disable it, set manual_trigger
to true.

message.description: Optional message to include in the notification.

slack.description: Deprecated: Slack notifications are no longer supported.
slack.deprecationMessage: Slack notifications are no longer supported

NotificationChannel.description: notification channel defines where to send a notification.

success.description: Notification channels to notify on task success.

failure.description: Notification channels to notify on task failure.

on_success.description: Deprecated: Slack notifications are no longer supported.
on_success.deprecationMessage: Slack notifications are no longer supported

on_success_message.description: Deprecated: Slack notifications are no longer supported.
on_success_message.deprecationMessage: Slack notifications are no longer supported

on_failure.description: Deprecated: Slack notifications are no longer supported.
on_failure.deprecationMessage: Slack notifications are no longer supported

on_failure_message.description: Deprecated: Slack notifications are no longer supported.
on_failure_message.deprecationMessage: Slack notifications are no longer supported

Notifications.description: notifications configure which channels to notify on task success or failure.

type.description:
parallel enables running tasks in parallel. All tasks start simultaneously;
the group succeeds when all complete.

tasks.description: Tasks to run in parallel. All tasks start simultaneously; the group succeeds when all complete.

Parallel.description:
parallel enables running tasks in parallel. All tasks start simultaneously;
the group succeeds when all complete.

type.description:
pipeline trigger runs the pipeline when another pipeline job has completed.
Note that you cannot trigger on pipelines from another team.

concourse_url.description: Concourse URL. Defaults to the current Concourse instance.

team.description: Team that owns the pipeline to trigger from. Must be the same team.

pipeline.description: Name of the pipeline to trigger from.

job.description: Job name within the pipeline to trigger from.

status.description: Job status to trigger on. Allowed values: succeeded, failed, errored, aborted. Defaults to succeeded.

PipelineTrigger.description:
pipeline trigger runs the pipeline when another pipeline job has completed.
Note that you cannot trigger on pipelines from another team.

type.description:
run is the most generic piece of work you can do. It represents a job in a
pipeline where a script will be run in a docker container. If the script
returns a non-zero exit code the task will be considered failed and any
subsequent tasks will not run.

script.description: Path to the script to execute, relative to the manifest. Prefix with \ to run a system command e.g. \make.

docker.description: Docker configuration for the task to run in.

privileged.description: Run the task as root. Not recommended but sometimes necessary e.g. for docker-in-docker.

vars.description: Environment variables available to the script.

save_artifacts.description: Paths to files or directories to save for use in subsequent tasks.

restore_artifacts.description: Restore artifacts saved by previous tasks.

save_artifacts_on_failure.description: Paths to save when the task fails, useful for test reports.

manual_trigger.description: Task must be triggered manually (Concourse only).

retries.description: Number of times to retry the task if it fails.

timeout.description: Timeout duration for the task. If exceeded the task fails. Defaults to 1h.

build_history.description: Number of build logs to retain. Defaults to 20 (Concourse only).

Run.description:
run is the most generic piece of work you can do. It represents a job in a
pipeline where a script will be run in a docker container. If the script
returns a non-zero exit code the task will be considered failed and any
subsequent tasks will not run.

type.description:
sequence enables running tasks in sequence within a parallel group. It can
only be used inside a parallel task.

tasks.description: Tasks to run in sequence within a parallel group. Can only be used inside a parallel task.

Sequence.description:
sequence enables running tasks in sequence within a parallel group. It can
only be used inside a parallel task.

type.description:
timer trigger runs the pipeline on a schedule. The cron expression must be
valid; remember to specify times in UTC. See [crontab.guru] for help
writing cron expressions.

[crontab.guru]: https://crontab.guru/

cron.description: Cron expression for the timer schedule. Times must be in UTC.

TimerTrigger.description:
timer trigger runs the pipeline on a schedule. The cron expression must be
valid; remember to specify times in UTC. See [crontab.guru] for help
writing cron expressions.

[crontab.guru]: https://crontab.guru/

Vars.description: Key-value pairs of environment variables (values are coerced to strings)

team.description: The platform team that owns this pipeline.

slack_channel.description: Deprecated: Slack notifications are no longer supported.
slack_channel.deprecationMessage: Slack notifications are no longer supported

teams_webhook.description: A Microsoft Teams webhook URL for pipeline-level notifications.

slack_success_message.description: Deprecated: Slack notifications are no longer supported.
slack_success_message.deprecationMessage: Slack notifications are no longer supported

slack_failure_message.description: Deprecated: Slack notifications are no longer supported.
slack_failure_message.deprecationMessage: Slack notifications are no longer supported

triggers.description: The triggers that cause this pipeline to run. Defaults to git.

tasks.description: The tasks that make up this pipeline.

platform.description: The CI platform to target. Defaults to concourse.
